<!-- 🚨 Kripya dhyan dein: Agar ye koi security vulnerability hai, toh ise yahan submit karne ke bajay hamari SECURITY.md policy ke mutabik privately report karein. -->

### 📝 Bug Description
Aapko kya problem aa rahi hai, usko yahan thoda sa detail me likhein:


### Steps to Reproduce
Hum is bug ko apne system par kaise check karein? (Step-by-step likhein):
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### 🎯 Expected Behavior
Aapke hisab se wahan par kya hona chahiye tha?


### Screenshots / Video Screen Recording
Agar aapke paas error ka koi screenshot ya video link hai, toh use yahan drag-and-drop karein:


### 💻 Environment Details
Aap kaunsa system ya browser use kar rahe hain?
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome, Safari]
- **Device:** [e.g., iPhone 14, Windows PC, Mobile]
- **Stack Context:** React Vite App / HTML Embedded Widget
